projectDescription: A lightweight C/C++ shared library for building X11 GUI applications with windows, UI elements, image canvases, and event handling.
keyFeatures: Single-header C API usable from C and C++
Built-in UI elements: text, buttons, inputs, rectangles, images, checkboxes
Image canvas with palette-indexed pixels and RLE sprite rendering
Event callbacks for keyboard, mouse clicks, and window close
Simple fixed-FPS game/app loop via GSimpleWindowLoop
Double-buffered rendering via X11 Pixmap for flicker-free display
Debug overlay showing frame time and FPS (toggle with F12)
Builds as a shared library (.so) with a minimal install
publicApiSurface: GCreateWindow(int w, int h, const char* name, int bgcol)
GCreateText(int id, int x, int y, int color, const char* text)
GCreateButton(int id, int x, int y, int w, int h, int u, int hvr, int p, const char* label, void (*onclick)(void))
GCreateInput(int id, int x, int y, int w, int h, int u, int hvr, int max)
GCreateRect(int id, int x, int y, int w, int h, int fg, int bg)
GCreateImage(int id, int x, int y, int w, int h)
GCreateCheckbox(int id, int x, int y, int size, int cb_col, int txt_col, const char* label)
GElemModifyBounds(int id, int x, int y, int w, int h)
GPrimitiveRect(int id, int x, int y, int w, int h, int fg, int bg)
GPrimitiveCircle(int id, int cx, int cy, int r, int fg, int bg)
GPrimitiveLine(int id, int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2, int color)
GPrimitiveSprite(int id, int sx, int sy, int color, const char* sprite, int scale)
GEventAttachClick(void (*Click)(int x, int y, int btn))
GQueryMouse(int* x, int* y, int* btn)
GSpawnModal(int type, const char* msg, void (*on_confirm)())
GPaletteQuery(int idx, unsigned char* r, unsigned char* g, unsigned char* b)
GPaletteModify(int idx, unsigned char r, unsigned char g, unsigned char b, int redraw)
